name: Pigeon 2.0
note: Part number needs verification against CTRE product catalog.

ports.name: Power Input
ports.note: Two hardwired leads (red/black), 22AWG. Voltage range needs verification from CTRE spec sheet.

ports.name: CAN
ports.note: Four hardwired leads, 22AWG, with 3-pin daisy-chain connector pair (one male, one female) for chaining devices. Two yellow wires are CANH and electrically common per the manual; one green is CANL; one black is ground.
